title:
LE10 3ED, Greenway Environmental Limited: environmental permit issued -
EPR/SP3832VR/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Greenway Environmental Limited Installation name: Hinckley Hazardous Waste Transfer Station Permit number: EPR/SP3832VR/V004  "
